## Problem

What user or business problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the ideal behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The user can
- [ ] The system should
- [ ] The feature is documented

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

List security, data, cost, or UX concerns.
